name: launch10-monorepo
description: Launch10 monorepo with Rails frontend and Langgraph backend

scripts.docs:generate: cd rails_app && bundle exec rake rswag:specs:swaggerize
scripts.types:sync: pnpm run docs:generate && pnpm run types:generate && pnpm --filter @launch10/shared run build:types
scripts.precommit:rails: cd rails_app && bundle exec rubocop --autocorrect-all --format simple
scripts.precommit:langgraph: cd langgraph_app && pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:rails && pnpm run test:langgraph
scripts.lint:all: pnpm run lint:rails && pnpm run lint:langgraph
scripts.format: cd langgraph_app && pnpm run format && cd ../rails_app && pnpm run format
scripts.format:check: cd langgraph_app && pnpm run format:check && cd ../rails_app && pnpm run format:check
